json_data.title: Computer Hardware Components and Their Functions
json_data.reason: This topic provides a deeper understanding of the physical components an OS manages and how they contribute to the computer's operation, directly complementing the historical evolution.

json_data.title: Operating System Internals (Process & Memory Management)
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the specific algorithms and techniques used by an operating system's Processor and Memory Managers, building directly on the foundational OS concepts.

json_data.title: Distributed Systems
json_data.reason: This topic extends OS concepts to managing resources across multiple interconnected computers, addressing the complexities of large-scale systems and cloud computing environments.
